definition: person on trial (bị cáo)
example: the accused
collocations: the accused|accused of murder/theft

definition: [specialist]acidic, low-pH (có tính axit)|sour/sharp-tasting (có vị chua gắt)
example: Rye is tolerant of poor, acid soils.|acid (sour) fruit
collocations: acid soil/rain|acid taste/fruit

definition: [formal]public supporter or support publicly (người ủng hộ/ủng hộ công khai)
example:
an advocate for hospital workers

The group does not advocate the use of violence.
collocations: advocate for/of sb/sth|strong/leading advocate|advocate the use of sth

definition: follow or obey rules/beliefs (tuân thủ)
example: Staff should adhere strictly to the safety guidelines.
collocations: adhere to rules/principles/guidelines|adhere strictly/closely to sth|adhere to a diet/method

definition: love and care (tình cảm/quý mến)

collocations: show/feel affection|love and affection|affection for sb

definition: strange or foreign (xa lạ/ngoại lai)|from outer space (ngoài hành tinh)
example: an alien (hostile) environment|alien life forms
collocations: alien environment/culture|alien to sb/sth|alien life/forms

definition: arrow weapon (cung)|loop knot (nơ)|violin stick (vĩ kéo đàn)
example: He was armed with a bow and arrow.|to tie your shoelaces in a bow|She drew the bow across the strings.
collocations: bow and arrow|draw/aim a bow|tie sth in a bow|violin bow

definition: bend head/body (cúi đầu/cúi chào)
example:
She gave a slight bow of her head in greeting.

He bowed low to the assembled crowd.
collocations: give/make/take a bow|bow your head|bow to sb|bow low/down

definition: admission of wrongdoing (lời thú nhận)

collocations: make a confession|full/false confession|confession of guilt|confession to sth

definition: dishonesty or moral decay (tham nhũng/tha hóa)

collocations: bribery and corruption|political/public corruption|fight/tackle corruption|corruption scandal

definition: make with skill (chế tác)
example: All the furniture is crafted (fashion) from natural materials.
collocations: craft sth from sth|carefully crafted speech/object

definition: put money into a bank account (gửi tiền vào tài khoản)|pay money in advance or as refundable security (đặt cọc)
example: Millions were deposited in Swiss bank accounts.|You deposit 20 percent now and pay the rest when the car is delivered.
collocations: deposit money/funds in an account|deposit a sum as security|deposit money with a landlord

definition: prevent sb from having sth important (tước đoạt/làm cho ai đó thiếu thốn cái gì)
example: They were imprisoned and deprived of their basic rights.
collocations: deprive sb of sth|be deprived of rights/sleep/food|deprived area/childhood

definition: come from a source/origin (bắt nguồn từ)|get sth from a source (lấy/rút ra từ)
example: The word ‘politics’ is derived from a Greek word meaning ‘city’.|He derived great pleasure from painting.
collocations: derive from sth|be derived from sth|derive sth from sth|derive benefit/pleasure from sth

definition: give time/effort/resources to sth (dành/cống hiến)
example: I could only devote two hours a day to the work.
collocations: devote time/energy/attention to sth|devote yourself to sth|devote resources/space to sth

definition: between countries (ngoại giao)|tactful (khéo léo)

collocations: diplomatic relations/crisis/mission|diplomatic answer/way/skill

definition: city center area (trung tâm thành phố)

definition: how people or things interact (động lực/tương tác)

definition: [biology]gradual development/change (sự tiến hóa/phát triển)

definition: [formal]leave or quit (rời/thoát)

definition: remove or obtain sth (lấy ra/chiết xuất)

definition: for all normal work/study hours (toàn thời gian)

definition: main land, not nearby islands (đất liền/lục địa chính)

definition: book for notes (sổ tay/vở ghi)

definition: done by one person alone|a piece or performance for one person

definition: focus on one area (chuyên về)

definition: strong-tasting plant powder/seed (gia vị)

definition: showing respect to God (thờ phụng)|strong love/respect (sùng bái)

collocations: act/place of worship|morning/evening worship|ancestor worship|worship of sb/sth

definition: output or produce sth (sản lượng/tạo ra)|[formal]stop resisting (đầu hàng/nhượng bộ)

Higher-rate deposit accounts yield good returns.|After a long siege, the town was forced to yield (give way).
collocations: high/low crop yield|yield returns/results/fruit|yield to demands/pressure/temptation

definition: in a very short time (trong nháy mắt)
example: It was all over in the blink of an eye.
collocations: in the blink of an eye

definition: secondary result of a process (sản phẩm phụ/hệ quả phụ)

definition: make a system or government less stable (gây bất ổn/làm mất ổn định)

definition: fasten to sth (móc/gắn)

definition: Japanese rice alcohol (rượu sake)

collocations: drink/serve sake|bottle/cup of sake
in accordance with rules/law/requirements|act in accordance with sth

definition: balance or reduce an opposing cost/effect (bù đắp/cân bằng)

definition: amount out of every 100 (phần trăm)

definition: out or away (ra ngoài/đi xa)

collocations: ignorant person/question/comment|ignorant of/about sth|rude and ignorant
